body_excerpt: In isRealSnapshot of TaskThumbnailView.java, there is possible data exposure due to a missing permission check. This could lead to local information disclosure from locked profiles with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
